text.name: fd_shop_desc
text.text: A placeable Fertilizer Depot where you can buy, store, and sell all fertilizer types at seasonally-adjusted prices.

text.name: fd_silo_function
text.text: Drive up with trailer to fill any fertilizer. Requires Fertilizer Depot.

text.name: fd_silo_desc
text.text: The Fertilizer Filling Silo is the second half of the Fertilizer Depot system. Place it near your fields and drive up to fill.

text.name: fd_settings_admin_only
text.text: View only — admin required to change settings

text.name: fd_depot_order_set
text.text: [EN] Order set: %s %.0fL — walk to silo to collect.

text.name: fd_silo_no_order
text.text: [EN] No pending order. Confirm a type at the Depot first.

text.name: fd_silo_fill_confirm
text.text:
[EN] Collect %.0fL of %s?
Your vehicle will be filled.

text.name: fd_products_no_stock
text.text: [EN] Insufficient depot stock for this order.

text.name: fd_products_no_object
text.text: [EN] No physical object registered for this type.

text.name: fd_pickup_function
text.text: [EN] Supplier pickup zone for delivery orders. Place near the in-game shop.

text.name: fd_delivery_pickup_confirm
text.text:
[EN] Collect delivery for %s?
Goods will be stocked when you return to your depot.

text.name: fd_delivery_order_confirm
text.text:
[EN] Place delivery order for %d fill type(s)?
Total cost on pickup: %s (10%% delivery fee included)

text.name: fd_delivery_cancel_confirm
text.text:
[EN] Cancel delivery order?
A penalty of %s (20%% of delivery cost) will be deducted.

text.name: fd_delivery_complete_confirm
text.text:
[EN] Complete delivery and stock your depot?
All ordered fill types will be added to storage.

text.name: fd_delivery_no_pickup_placed
text.text: [EN] Place a Fertilizer Supplier pickup zone near the in-game shop first.

text.name: fd_delivery_all_full
text.text: [EN] All fill types are at capacity — no delivery needed.

text.name: fd_delivery_status_pending
text.text: [EN] Delivery pending — drive to Pickup Zone to collect | Cancel penalty: %s

text.name: fd_delivery_status_ready
text.text: [EN] Delivery ready — click to stock your depot.

text.name: fd_delivery_status_park
text.text: [EN] Park delivery vehicle within 25m of unload zone (%.0fm away)

text.name: fd_delivery_status_return
text.text: [EN] Return to depot and park near the unload zone.

text.name: fd_delivery_order_placed
text.text: [EN] Order placed — drive to the Pickup Zone.

text.name: fd_delivery_completing
text.text: [EN] Delivery complete! Stock has been added.

text.name: fd_delivery_already_active
text.text: [EN] A delivery is already in progress.

text.name: fd_delivery_no_pickup
text.text: [EN] No supplier pickup zone placed on this map.

text.name: fd_delivery_stock_full
text.text: [EN] All fill types are at capacity — no delivery needed.

text.name: fd_delivery_wrong_status
text.text: [EN] Delivery is not in the correct state for this action.

text.name: fd_delivery_wrong_farm
text.text: [EN] This delivery belongs to a different farm.
